keep.reason: More appropriate naming - checks API-level field logging configuration. Both rules check identical condition (logConfig exists).

remove.reason: EXACT DUPLICATE - Both check identical field (logConfig exists). Metadata scope mismatch: says 'field' but checks API-level config. aws.appsync.resource.field_level_logging_enabled has more accurate naming.

recommendations.description: Update YAML condition to check logConfig.fieldLogLevel is not NONE (currently only checks if logConfig exists). Should verify logging is actually enabled, not just configured.
recommendations.impact: Improves validation accuracy - ensures logging is enabled, not just that config object exists

recommendations.description: Merge 2 duplicate rules checking logConfig exists. Keep resource.field_level_logging_enabled, remove field.level_logging_enabled (has scope mismatch).
recommendations.impact: Reduces duplicate rules, fixes metadata scope mismatch, preserves compliance coverage

recommendations.description: Metadata says it checks 'field' level logging with scope appsync.field.logging, but implementation checks API-level logConfig. Either update metadata to reflect API-level check, or implement proper field-level discovery if that's the intent.

validation_issues: Both rules check identical condition (logConfig exists) but have different rule_ids
aws.appsync.field.level_logging_enabled has metadata scope mismatch (says 'field' but checks API)
Current check only verifies logConfig exists, doesn't ensure logging is enabled (fieldLogLevel could be NONE)

field_analysis.recommendation: Should check logConfig.fieldLogLevel is not NONE to ensure logging is actually enabled

compliance_coverage.recommendation: Merge compliance standards from field.level_logging_enabled into resource.field_level_logging_enabled when consolidating

issues: Both rules check same condition but have different metadata
Check only verifies logConfig exists, should check fieldLogLevel is not NONE

test_results.note: No AppSync APIs found in test accounts - YAML structure validated, no execution errors

issues: Metadata says checks 'field' level logging but discovery returns GraphQL APIs
Only checks if logConfig exists, doesn't verify logging is enabled (fieldLogLevel)
aws.appsync.field.level_logging_enabled.recommendation: Consolidate into resource.field_level_logging_enabled or fix to check fieldLogLevel

issues: Only checks if logConfig exists, doesn't verify logging is enabled (fieldLogLevel should not be NONE)
aws.appsync.resource.field_level_logging.recommendation: Update to check logConfig.fieldLogLevel is not NONE
